portfolio_rationale: Risk-on tilt into the FOMC week with oil collapsing on Iran de-escalation and VIX falling. Concentrate in semis/AI complex and momentum where trend is strongest, with Korea as levered semi proxy and biotech as rate-sensitive kicker.
rationale_summary: Lean into AI/semis momentum and growth tech as geopolitical risk eases and FOMC likely sounds dovish given softening labor data, while oil-driven inflation pressure abates.
